$comment: Example archived MCP server config for the /mcp-activate-* commands. Copy files like this into ~/.claude/mcp-archive/ — one file per server, keyed by server name. The activate commands read them with: claude mcp add-json <name> "$(cat ~/.claude/mcp-archive/<name>.json | jq '.<name>')". Keep API keys as ${ENV_VAR} references, never literal values.
